name: Suspicious MachineGUID Query Detected
description: Detects the use of `reg.exe` to query the MachineGUID. While a legitimate tool, adversaries and ransomware can use this to obtain a unique identifier for the system. This activity is not inherently malicious, but it's often associated with reconnaissance or malicious tracking.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'reg.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the reg.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute reg.exe, including parameters for querying MachineGUID.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which reg.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
